kp2:1.1: I undertake the training rule to refrain from taking life.
kp2:2.1: I undertake the training rule to refrain from stealing.
kp2:3.1: I undertake the training rule to refrain from sexual intercourse.
kp2:4.1: I undertake the training rule to refrain from telling lies.
kp2:5.1: I undertake the training rule to refrain from intoxicating fermented & distilled beverages that lead to carelessness.
kp2:6.1: I undertake the training rule to refrain from eating at the wrong time [after noon & before dawn].
kp2:7.1: I undertake the training rule to refrain from dancing, singing, music, & watching shows.
kp2:8.1: I undertake the training rule to refrain from wearing garlands and beautifying myself with perfumes & cosmetics.
kp2:9.1: I undertake the training rule to refrain from high & luxurious seats & beds.
kp2:10.1: I undertake the training rule to refrain from accepting gold & money.
